title: Northern Irish Sausage and Mash
description: A hearty, comforting dish featuring Northern Irish sausages served with creamy mash and roasted vegetables.

ingredients.name: Northern Irish sausages
ingredients.notes: bangers can be substituted if unavailable

instructions: Roast the vegetables in the oven for 20-25 minutes, or until tender.
Boil the potatoes until tender. Drain and mash with butter, milk, and a pinch of salt and pepper.
Cook the sausages in a pan over medium-high heat, or grill until browned and cooked through.
Serve the sausages with the roasted vegetables and mashed potatoes.
